2606.04602.title: Parthenon Law: A Self-Evolving Legal-Agent Framework
2606.04602.paper_summary: As agents grow more capable, legal-domain LLM agents promise to turn document-heavy matters into reviewable work products -- yet reliable deployment faces three obstacles: no large-scale evidence on how today's strongest model-and-harness combinations behave on end-to-end legal matters; no agent architecture adapted to the legal vertical, only general-purpose harnesses; and, in a setting that keeps shifting with new facts, authorities, and deadlines, no mechanism for systems to learn from their own outcomes. We address each. A large-scale empirical study on Harvey LAB -- $12{,}510$ agent trajectories -- shows that even frontier agents remain far from completing matters in a single pass: per-criterion accuracy climbs with stronger models while strict matter completion stalls. We then introduce \textsc{Parthenon}, a self-evolving legal-agent framework that factors Model, Harness, Agent roles, legal Knowledge, deterministic Tools, and procedural Skills into auditable surfaces for source traceability, date and number grounding, deliverable compliance, and issue closure. Finally, an anti-leakage learning loop converts scored failures into task-agnostic edits to skills, tools, and knowledge, letting the system improve with experience -- as a firm refines its checklists and playbooks after each matter -- without touching model weights. Across our large-scale empirical analysis, \textsc{Parthenon} substantially improves the performance of state-of-the-art models and harnesses on legal-matter tasks.
2606.04602.paper_summary_zh: 隨著代理人能力的增強，法律領域的 LLM 代理人有望將文件繁重的事務轉化為可審查的工作產品——然而，可靠的部署面臨三個障礙：沒有大規模的證據顯示當前最強模型與工具組合在端到端法律事務中的表現；沒有適應法律領域的代理架構，只有通用的工具組；而在一個隨著新事實、權威和截止日期不斷變化的環境中，沒有機制讓系統從自身的結果中學習。我們逐一解決這些問題。一項關於 Harvey LAB 的大規模實證研究——$12{,}510$ 個代理軌跡——顯示即使是前沿代理也遠未能在單次過程中完成事務：每個標準的準確性隨著更強模型的使用而上升，但嚴格的事務完成卻停滯不前。我們接著介紹 \textsc{Parthenon}，一個自我演化的法律代理框架，將模型、工具、代理角色、法律知識、確定性工具和程序技能整合為可審計的表面，以實現來源可追溯性、日期和數字的基礎、交付合規性和問題解決。最後，一個反漏學習循環將得分失敗轉化為與任務無關的技能、工具和知識的編輯，讓系統隨著經驗不斷改進——就像一家公司在每個事務後精煉其檢查清單和行動手冊——而不觸及模型權重。在我們的大規模實證分析中，\textsc{Parthenon} 顯著提升了最先進模型和工具在法律事務任務上的表現。
2606.04602.author: Hejia Geng et.al.
